title: Products affected by action to stop imports from Micro Labs in India - Canada.ca
content:
## Products affected by action to stop imports from Micro Labs in India
Health Canada took action on October 27, 2014 to stop the import of health products from the following sites in India: Micro Labs - Bangalore, Goa and Tamil Nadu/Hosur.
These lists are based on the most recent information received by Health Canada as of October 27, 2014. The lists will continue to be updated as new information becomes available.

## Medically Necessary Products
Medically Necessary Products To date no products manufactured at these sites for the Canadian market have been determined to be medically necessary. Products will continue to be assessed for medical necessity and the list will be updated should new information become available.
ECL Pharma Group Ltd.
Jamp Pharma Corporation
Marcan Pharmaceuticals Inc.
Mylan Pharmaceuticals ULC
PMS-Diclofenac/Misoprostol
Ranbaxy Pharmaceuticals Canada Inc.
Septa Pharmaceuticals Inc.
Arthritis Pain Relief
